推荐场景: 客服谈判桌｜综合问题、不满、政策、要求、方案
60秒任务: 「投诉 Boss」：投诉/政策/要求/方案；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 投诉｜政策｜责任｜要求｜补偿｜解决方案评估
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Let’s clarify the problem, policy, and possible solution.（整合投诉脉络）
The customer’s main concern is ___.（识别客户关切）
The service side is emphasizing ___.（识别服务方立场）
The policy allows ___, but not ___.（判断政策范围）
The fairest solution may be ___.（评估公平方案）
We need to separate responsibility from blame.（区分责任与指责）
What evidence supports the complaint?（寻找证据）
What outcome would resolve the issue?（明确结果）
A refund may be reasonable if ___.（条件性退款）
A replacement works better if ___.（条件性更换）
The key question is whether the policy applies here.（核心判断点）
The tone changes when ___.（识别语气变化）
There is room for negotiation.（谈判空间）
Let’s compare the options before deciding.（比较方案）
The final agreement should be confirmed in writing.（书面收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: complaint, policy, evidence, responsibility, blame, refund, replacement, negotiation
Verbs: clarify, compare, apply, resolve, negotiate, confirm, compensate, decide
Adjectives / Status: fair, reasonable, eligible, unresolved, written, negotiable
Time / Place: at the service desk, over the phone, after review, in writing, today
Chunks: main concern, possible solution, room for negotiation, final agreement, confirmed in writing
